description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the rust:1.58.1-alpine3.15 Docker image and a default before_script that installs build-base via apk and sets up nightly Rust with rustup. Define three stages: test, build, and bench. Add a tests job in the test stage that runs rustc --version && cargo --version then cargo test --all --verbose. Add a release_build job in the build stage that runs only on the main branch or tags, executes cargo build --release, moves the resulting binary to the project root, strips it, generates a SHA256 checksum saved to sha.txt, and stores the binary and checksum as artifacts. Add a benches job in the bench stage that runs only when the $BENCH variable is set and executes cargo bench.
